articles.title: Aphelion and Life is Strange developer Don't Nod in trouble as it struggles to secure funding for its next project - Eurogamer

articles.title: Live Update 1.33.0 - ARC Raiders
articles.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

articles.title: Noctua NL-LC1-36 AIO Review - Very Impressive - TechPowerUp
articles.description: The NL-LC1-36 is exactly what you'd expect from Noctua's first all-in-one liquid cooler. It offers an impressive mix of high performance, minimal noise, and exceptional engineering, making it a standout choice in a saturated market. Perfect for those who pref…

articles.title: After resurrecting an iconic PC brand, Commodore is getting into flip phones - The Verge
articles.description: The Callback is another bit of gadget nostalgia. It also has a very modern appeal.
